description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push to master and dev branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.7 to 3.11). For each job, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version, install requirements, run Tox, and report coverage to Coveralls. Additionally, have a conditional finish job that uploads the final coverage report to Coveralls if the workflow is for the btclib-org/btclib repository and the base reference is master.
